name: RelatedComponents
source_code:
// src/components/RelatedComponents.astro --- import { getCollection } from 'astro:content' import { ArrowRight } from '@lucide/astro' import ComponentCard from './ComponentCard.astro' type Props = { slug: string terms: string[] category: 'application' | 'marketing' | 'neobrutalism' } const { slug, terms, category } = Astro.props const termsSet = new Set(terms) const components = (await getCollection(category)) .map(({ data }) => data) .filter((item) => item.slug !== slug && item.terms.some((term) => termsSet.has(term))) .slice(0, 5) ---
{ components.length > 0 && (

Related components

    {components.map((component) => ( ))}
) } View all {category} components
